prompt: We're building a new payment processing service with Stripe integration. It has webhook handlers, idempotency logic, and retry mechanisms. Our test coverage is currently 0%. Help me design a comprehensive testing strategy.

assertions.text: Applies the test pyramid framework (unit > integration > E2E proportions)
Recommends mocking Stripe API calls (MSW or similar)
Suggests a test file organization structure
Prioritizes which tests to write first (critical paths)
